name: Sleep Wind Down
description: Gentle affirmations to release the day and welcome rest.

affirmations.text: I soften my shoulders and let the day melt away.
My breathing slows; my mind is allowed to be quiet.
I did enough today; my worth is not measured by my output.
I release unfinished tasks to tomorrow’s fresh light.
My bed is a safe place; I am held and at ease.
I forgive small frustrations from today with compassion.
Grateful thoughts anchor me as I drift toward sleep.
I trust my body to restore me while I rest.
